videoUrls.title: Video URLs
videoUrls.description: TikTok video URLs or video IDs. Supports: https://www.tiktok.com/@user/video/123, https://vm.tiktok.com/ZMxxx/, or raw numeric IDs.
videoUrls.sectionDescription: Paste TikTok video URLs to download.

maxVideoSizeMb.title: Max video size (MB)
maxVideoSizeMb.description: Maximum video file size to download in MB. Videos larger than this will only have CDN URLs in the output. Max 30MB.

maxConcurrentDownloads.title: Parallel downloads
maxConcurrentDownloads.description: Number of videos to download in parallel.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy
proxyConfiguration.description: Apify Proxy configuration. Default uses RESIDENTIAL proxies.
proxyConfiguration.sectionDescription: These settings work well with defaults. Change only if needed.

useProxy.title: Use residential proxy
useProxy.description: Use Apify RESIDENTIAL proxy. Disable to save bandwidth (may get blocked).

msToken.title: msToken (optional)
msToken.description: TikTok auth token. Leave empty for automatic generation (recommended).
